Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthResult

Packages that use AuthResult
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.

  • Uses of AuthResult in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type AuthResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.setAuthResult(AuthResult value)
    Sets the resolved resource-level authentication result.

  • Uses of AuthResult in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth that return AuthResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.of(Principal principal, String... roles)
    Creates an AuthResult with the specified principal and roles using AuthResult.MergeMode.ADD mode.
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.of(Principal principal, Set<String> roles)
    Creates an AuthResult with the specified principal and role set using AuthResult.MergeMode.ADD mode.
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.ofRoles(String... roles)
    Creates a roles-only AuthResult (AuthResult.MergeMode.ADD mode, null principal).
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.ofRoles(Collection<String> roles)
    Creates a roles-only AuthResult (AuthResult.MergeMode.ADD mode, null principal).
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.replacing(Principal principal, String... roles)
    Creates an AuthResult that replaces any accumulated identity and roles.
    static AuthResult
    AuthResult.replacing(Principal principal, Set<String> roles)
    Creates an AuthResult that replaces any accumulated identity and roles.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth that return types with arguments of type AuthResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<AuthResult>
    ApiKeyAuthFilter.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
     
    Optional<AuthResult>
    Authenticator.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
    Inspects the request and returns the authentication result.
    Optional<AuthResult>
    AuthFilterChain.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest hreq)
    Runs the composed AuthFilter entries for the request and folds their results, without writing any response.
    Optional<AuthResult>
    BearerTokenAuthFilter.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
     
    abstract Optional<AuthResult>
    RestAuthenticator.authenticate(RestRequest req)
    Resolves identity + roles for the request.
    Optional<AuthResult>
    RestAuthenticator.Null.authenticate(RestRequest req)
     
    Optional<AuthResult>
    AuthResultAccumulator.result()
    Returns the folded result.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    AuthResultAccumulator.add(AuthResult r)
    Folds the next result into this accumulator.
